judgmentZh: 巽：小亨，利有攸往，利见大人。
judgmentEn: The Gentle. Success through what is small. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. It furthers one to see the great man.
imageZh: 随风，巽；君子以申命行事。
imageEn: Winds following one upon the other: the image of the Gently Penetrating. Thus the superior man spreads his commands abroad and carries out his undertakings.
interpretationZh: 巽卦象征风，柔顺而渗透。两风相随，无孔不入，以柔克刚，循序渐进方能成事。
interpretationEn: Xun symbolizes wind and gentle penetration. Two winds following each other penetrate everywhere. Gentle persistence achieves what force cannot.

lines.textEn: Six at the beginning: In advancing and in retreating, the perseverance of a warrior furthers.
lines.interpretationZh: 进退犹豫不决，宜以武人般的坚毅果断来行事。
lines.interpretationEn: Hesitating between advance and retreat. The resolve of a warrior is needed.
lines.detailZh: 初六“进退，利武人之贞”描述了巽卦初始的犹豫状态——进也不是、退也不是，举棋不定。“利武人之贞”建议此时需要武人般的果断和坚定。巽卦虽然强调柔顺，但过度的犹豫反而有害。这一爻教导我们：柔顺不等于优柔寡断，在需要决断的时候必须果断。巽的智慧是“柔中有刚”，而非一味的软弱。
lines.detailEn: The first six describes initial hesitation—advancing and retreating indecisively. 'The perseverance of a warrior furthers' advises that despite Xun's emphasis on gentleness, excessive hesitation is harmful. Gentleness does not mean indecisiveness; when decisions are needed, be decisive. Xun's wisdom is 'firmness within softness,' not pure weakness.

lines.textZh: 九二：巽在床下，用史巫纷若，吉无咎。
lines.textEn: Nine in the second place: Penetration under the bed. Priests and magicians are used in great number. Good fortune. No blame.
lines.interpretationZh: 谦卑至极如伏于床下，借助祝史巫觋之力，吉利无咎。
lines.interpretationEn: Extreme humility, penetrating beneath the bed. Employing many intermediaries brings fortune.
lines.detailZh: 九二“巽在床下，用史巫纷若，吉无咎”——巽顺到了床下的位置，用祝史和巫师纷纷祈祷。九二阳爻居阴位，过于谦卑。“床下”象征极度的谦逊，甚至有些过分。但“用史巫纷若”表示通过各种渠道反复沟通和祈求，最终“吉无咎”。这一爻说明：在某些情况下，极度的谦逊和反复的沟通虽然看起来卑微，但确实能解决问题。
lines.detailEn: The second nine—'Penetration under the bed. Priests and magicians are used in great number. Good fortune. No blame'—represents extreme humility, even seemingly excessive. Yet through multiple channels of repeated communication and supplication, good fortune results. Sometimes extreme humility and persistent communication, though appearing lowly, genuinely solve problems.

lines.textEn: Nine in the third place: Repeated penetration. Humiliation.
lines.interpretationZh: 反复屈从，过于卑顺，有所困窘。
lines.interpretationEn: Repeated submission becomes humiliating. Excessive yielding brings shame.
lines.detailZh: 九三“频巽，吝”——反复犹豫、频繁改变主意，困窘。九三处于下卦之顶，阳爻居阳位，本应刚健果断，却陷入了“频巽”的状态——一会儿顺从这个，一会儿顺从那个，没有自己的主见。这一爻警告我们：柔顺是美德，但没有原则的柔顺就变成了随波逐流。真正的巽德是有方向的渗透，而非无目的的摇摆。
lines.detailEn: The third nine—'Repeated penetration. Humiliation'—warns against vacillation and constantly changing direction. Yielding is a virtue, but yielding without principles becomes aimless drifting. True Xun virtue is penetration with direction, not purposeless wavering.

lines.textEn: Six in the fourth place: Remorse vanishes. During the hunt three kinds of game are caught.
lines.interpretationZh: 悔恨消失，如田猎获得三种猎物，收获丰厚。
lines.interpretationEn: Remorse vanishes. Three kinds of game are caught in the hunt. Rich rewards.
lines.detailZh: 六四“悔亡，田获三品”——后悔消失，打猎获得三种猎物。六四进入上卦，柔顺得位，是巽德发挥作用的阶段。“田获三品”象征丰厚的收获——通过持续的柔顺渗透，终于获得了实质性的成果。“三品”在古代指祭祀用的三种猎物，代表最高规格的收获。这一爻鼓励我们：坚持巽的策略，耐心终将得到丰厚的回报。
lines.detailEn: The fourth six—'Remorse vanishes. During the hunt, three kinds of game are caught'—represents the stage where gentle persistence finally yields substantial results. 'Three kinds of game' symbolizes the highest level of harvest. Through sustained gentle penetration, rich rewards finally materialize. Patience with Xun's strategy ultimately brings abundant returns.

lines.textZh: 九五：贞吉悔亡，无不利。无初有终。先庚三日，后庚三日，吉。
lines.textEn: Nine in the fifth place: Perseverance brings good fortune. Remorse vanishes. Nothing that does not further. No beginning, but an end. Before the change, three days. After the change, three days. Good fortune.
lines.interpretationZh: 坚守正道则吉，悔恨消失。虽无好的开始但有好的结局，变革前后各需三日准备。
lines.interpretationEn: Perseverance brings fortune and remorse vanishes. No good beginning but a good end. Allow time before and after changes.
lines.detailZh: 九五“贞吉悔亡，无不利。无初有终。先庚三日，后庚三日，吉”是巽卦最吉利的一爻。“无初有终”意为开始时可能不顺利，但最终会有好结果。“先庚三日，后庚三日”与蛊卦的“先甲三日，后甲三日”相呼应，强调变革前后都需要充分的准备和善后。九五居尊位，代表以巽德治理天下的领导者——温和而坚定，渐进而彻底。
lines.detailEn: The fifth nine is Xun's most auspicious line. 'No beginning but an end' means initial difficulties lead to good outcomes. 'Before the change, three days; after the change, three days' emphasizes thorough preparation before and careful follow-through after any reform. This represents leadership through Xun virtue—gentle yet firm, gradual yet thorough.

lines.textZh: 上九：巽在床下，丧其资斧，贞凶。
lines.textEn: Nine at the top: Penetration under the bed. He loses his property and his ax. Perseverance brings misfortune.
lines.interpretationZh: 过度卑顺伏于床下，丧失了财物和权柄，坚持下去则凶。
lines.interpretationEn: Excessive submission beneath the bed. Property and authority are lost. Persisting brings misfortune.
lines.detailZh: 上九“巽在床下，丧其资斧，贞凶”——巽顺到了床下，还丢失了资财和斧头，坚守正道也是凶险的。上九是巽卦的极端——柔顺过度，已经失去了自我和行动的能力（丧其资斧）。斧头象征决断力，丢失斧头意味着完全丧失了果断行动的能力。这一爻严厉警告：柔顺到了极端就变成了软弱和无能。巽卦的智慧是“柔中有刚”，一旦失去了“刚”的部分，就只剩下无力的屈服。
lines.detailEn: The top nine—'Penetration under the bed. He loses his property and his ax. Perseverance brings misfortune'—represents Xun taken to its extreme. Excessive yielding leads to losing both resources (property) and decisiveness (the ax). This line sternly warns that gentleness pushed to the extreme becomes weakness and incompetence. Xun's wisdom is 'firmness within softness'; lose the firmness, and only powerless submission remains.

overviewZh: 巽卦是《周易》第五十七卦，由上巽（风）下巽（风）组成，重风相叠，象征风行天下、无孔不入。“巽”的本义是顺从、渗透，引申为柔顺、谦逊、深入。风的特性是无形却无处不在，能穿透一切缝隙——这正是巽卦的核心智慧：以柔克刚、以渐进代替激进、以渗透代替强攻。巽卦不是软弱的顺从，而是一种高明的策略——像风一样，看似温柔却能移山填海。
overviewEn: Xun (The Gentle/Wind) is the 57th hexagram, composed of Xun (wind) doubled—wind upon wind, symbolizing pervasive, penetrating influence. 'Xun' means yielding, penetrating, and gradual—the wind is invisible yet omnipresent, able to pass through every crack. This is Xun's core wisdom: overcoming hardness with softness, replacing radical action with gradual progress, substituting penetration for frontal assault. Xun is not weak submission but a sophisticated strategy—like wind, seemingly gentle yet capable of moving mountains and filling seas.
judgmentDetailZh: 巽卦卦辞“巽：小亨，利有攸往，利见大人”表明巽卦的通达是“小亨”——不是轰轰烈烈的大成功，而是润物细无声的渐进式成功。《彖传》释曰：“重巽以申命，刚巽乎中正而志行，柔皆顺乎刚，是以小亨”——重复的巽象征反复申明命令，以柔顺的方式贯彻刚正的意志。“利有攸往”鼓励前进，但方式是巽的方式——不是冲锋陷阵，而是循序渐进。“利见大人”提示在渐进的过程中需要有明确的方向和引导者。
judgmentDetailEn: The judgment 'The Gentle. Success through what is small. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. It furthers one to see the great man' indicates that Xun's success is 'small'—not dramatic breakthroughs but gradual, silent progress like rain nourishing the earth. The doubled Xun symbolizes repeatedly issuing commands, implementing firm will through gentle means. 'Having somewhere to go' encourages forward movement, but in Xun's way—not charging ahead but advancing step by step.
imageDetailZh: 象辞“随风，巽。君子以申命行事”描述了风接连不断吹拂的意象。“申命”意为反复申明命令——一次命令可能被忽视，但像风一样持续不断地传达，最终一定能深入人心。这是巽卦给出的管理智慧：重要的决策和理念不能只说一次就期望所有人理解执行，需要反复沟通、持续强调，像风一样不断渗透。在教育中，这就是“循循善诱”；在管理中，这就是“持续沟通”；在营销中，这就是“品牌渗透”。
imageDetailEn: The Image 'Winds following one upon the other: Xun. The superior man spreads his commands abroad and carries out his undertakings' describes winds blowing continuously. 'Spreading commands' means repeatedly communicating decisions—a single announcement may be ignored, but continuous delivery like persistent wind eventually penetrates every mind. In education, this is 'patient guidance'; in management, 'continuous communication'; in marketing, 'brand penetration.'
modernApplicationZh: 【事业】巽卦提示以渐进策略推进工作。不要期望一步到位，而是像风一样持续渗透。在推动变革时，“申命行事”——反复沟通、持续推进，比一次性的强制推行更有效。适合做长期规划、品牌建设、市场渗透等需要耐心的工作。【感情】巽卦在感情中代表温柔的坚持。不是猛烈的追求，而是持续的关心和陪伴。“随风”的方式——像春风一样温暖而持久，比暴风骤雨式的热情更能打动人心。【财运】巽卦象征稳健的长期投资策略。不追求暴利，而是通过持续的小额投入获得稳定回报。定投、复利、长期持有——这些都是巽卦的理财智慧。【健康】巽卦对应呼吸系统和神经系统（风为气），注意呼吸调理和情绪管理。练习深呼吸、冥想等“以柔克刚”的养生方法，效果优于剧烈运动。
modernApplicationEn: 【Career】Xun advises gradual strategy. Don't expect instant results; penetrate continuously like wind. When driving change, 'repeatedly communicate and steadily advance' works better than one-time enforcement. Ideal for long-term planning, brand building, and market penetration.【Love】Xun represents gentle persistence—not aggressive pursuit but continuous care and companionship. Like a spring breeze, warm and lasting, more touching than stormy passion.【Wealth】Xun symbolizes steady long-term investment. Don't chase windfall profits; achieve stable returns through consistent small contributions. Dollar-cost averaging, compound interest, long-term holding—all embody Xun's financial wisdom.【Health】Xun corresponds to respiratory and nervous systems. Practice breathing exercises and meditation—'overcoming hardness with softness' wellness methods often outperform intense exercise.
historicalStoryZh: 巽卦最经典的历史案例是刘备“三顾茅庐”。刘备为请诸葛亮出山，三次亲赴隆中拜访，每次都以最谦逊的姿态等候。这正是巽卦“柔顺渗透”的最佳体现——不是强迫，不是利诱，而是以真诚和耐心反复表达诚意，最终感动了诸葛亮。另一个典故是“水滴石穿”——水是天下至柔之物，却能穿透最坚硬的石头，靠的就是巽卦“持续渗透”的力量。老子说“天下莫柔弱于水，而攻坚强者莫之能胜”，这与巽卦的精神完全一致。
historicalStoryEn: The classic example of Xun is Liu Bei's 'Three Visits to the Thatched Cottage.' To recruit Zhuge Liang, Liu Bei visited three times with the utmost humility and patience—not through force or bribery but through sincere, repeated expression of genuine intent, ultimately moving Zhuge Liang to join his cause. Another example is 'water dripping through stone'—water, the softest substance, penetrates the hardest rock through persistent, gentle force. Laozi said 'Nothing in the world is softer than water, yet nothing is better at overcoming the hard and strong'—perfectly aligned with Xun's spirit.
relatedHexagramsNote: 巽卦的综卦为兑卦（第58卦），巽为入、兑为悦，一柔入一喜悦，渗透之后带来愉悦；错卦为震卦（第51卦），巽的柔顺与震的刚动形成对比。巽兑相综，揭示了“先以柔顺渗透，后获喜悦回报”的人生智慧。

judgmentEn: The Joyous. Success. Perseverance is favorable.
imageZh: 丽泽，兑；君子以朋友讲习。
imageEn: Lakes resting one on the other: the image of the Joyous. Thus the superior man joins with his friends for discussion and practice.
interpretationZh: 兑卦象征泽，喜悦而和谐。两泽相连，互相滋润，以喜悦之心待人，朋友切磋共进。
interpretationEn: Dui symbolizes the lake and joyousness. Two lakes connected nourish each other. Joy shared with friends through mutual learning and encouragement.

lines.textEn: Nine at the beginning: Contented joyousness. Good fortune.
lines.interpretationZh: 和谐的喜悦，内心平和而快乐，吉利。
lines.interpretationEn: Harmonious joy from within. Contentment brings good fortune.

lines.textEn: Nine in the second place: Sincere joyousness. Good fortune. Remorse disappears.
lines.interpretationZh: 以诚信带来的喜悦，吉利，悔恨消失。
lines.interpretationEn: Joy grounded in sincerity. Good fortune and remorse vanishes.

lines.textEn: Six in the third place: Coming joyousness. Misfortune.
lines.interpretationZh: 刻意追求外来的快乐，迎合取悦，凶险。
lines.interpretationEn: Seeking joy from external sources. Pandering to pleasure brings misfortune.

lines.textZh: 九四：商兑未宁，介疾有喜。
lines.textEn: Nine in the fourth place: Joyousness that is weighed is not at peace. After ridding himself of faults a man has joy.
lines.interpretationZh: 权衡取舍尚未安宁，去除弊病之后方有喜悦。
lines.interpretationEn: Deliberating over pleasures brings no peace. Joy comes after eliminating faults.

lines.textEn: Nine in the fifth place: Sincerity toward disintegrating influences is dangerous.
lines.interpretationZh: 信任那些有害的事物，有危险。对小人的信任会带来灾祸。
lines.interpretationEn: Trusting in destructive influences is dangerous. Beware of misplaced sincerity.

lines.textEn: Six at the top: Seductive joyousness.
lines.interpretationZh: 引诱他人的喜悦，沉溺于享乐，被欲望牵引。
lines.interpretationEn: Seductive joy that leads others astray. Drawn along by desire and indulgence.

judgmentZh: 涣：亨。王假有庙，利涉大川，利贞。
judgmentEn: Dispersion. Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers one to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.
imageZh: 风行水上，涣；先王以享于帝立庙。
imageEn: The wind drives over the water: the image of Dispersion. Thus the kings of old sacrificed to the Lord and built temples.
interpretationZh: 涣卦象征涣散，风行水上，波浪四散。以祭祀凝聚人心，以大义化解离散，方能重新团结。
interpretationEn: Huan symbolizes dispersion. Wind blowing over water scatters it. Unite scattered hearts through shared devotion and higher purpose.

lines.textEn: Six at the beginning: He brings help with the strength of a horse. Good fortune.
lines.interpretationZh: 用壮马之力来拯救，及时施救则吉利。
lines.interpretationEn: Rescue comes with the strength of a horse. Swift aid brings good fortune.

lines.textEn: Nine in the second place: At the dissolution he hurries to that which supports him. Remorse disappears.
lines.interpretationZh: 涣散之时奔向可依靠之处，悔恨消失。
lines.interpretationEn: In times of dispersion, hasten to a place of support. Remorse vanishes.

lines.textEn: Six in the third place: He dissolves his self. No remorse.
lines.interpretationZh: 化解自身的私欲执着，无所悔恨。
lines.interpretationEn: Dissolving selfish concerns. No remorse when ego is set aside.

lines.textZh: 六四：涣其群，元吉。涣有丘，匪夷所思。
lines.textEn: Six in the fourth place: He dissolves his bond with his group. Supreme good fortune. Dispersion leads to accumulation. This is something that ordinary men do not think of.
lines.interpretationZh: 化解小团体的私利，大吉。涣散之后重新聚合如丘，非常人所能想到。
lines.interpretationEn: Dissolving factional bonds brings supreme fortune. Dispersion leads to a higher gathering beyond ordinary thinking.

lines.textZh: 九五：涣汗其大号，涣王居，无咎。
lines.textEn: Nine in the fifth place: His loud cries are as dissolving as sweat. Dissolution! A king abides without blame.
lines.interpretationZh: 如汗水般发布重大号令，王者居正位化解涣散，无咎。
lines.interpretationEn: Great proclamations dissolve barriers like sweat. The king holds his position without blame.

lines.textZh: 上九：涣其血，去逖出，无咎。
lines.textEn: Nine at the top: He dissolves his blood. Departing, keeping at a distance, going out, is without blame.
lines.interpretationZh: 化解血光之灾，远离危险，离去则无咎。
lines.interpretationEn: Dissolving bloodshed by departing and keeping distance. No blame in withdrawal.

judgmentEn: Limitation. Success. Galling limitation must not be persevered in.
imageZh: 泽上有水，节；君子以制数度，议德行。
imageEn: Water over lake: the image of Limitation. Thus the superior man creates number and measure, and examines the nature of virtue and correct conduct.
interpretationZh: 节卦象征节制，泽上有水，水量有限。适度节制则亨通，过度苦节则不可持久。
interpretationEn: Jie symbolizes limitation. Water over the lake is finite. Moderate restraint brings success, but bitter limitation cannot endure.

lines.textEn: Nine at the beginning: Not going out of the door and the courtyard is without blame.
lines.interpretationZh: 不出门庭，知所节制，无过失。
lines.interpretationEn: Not going beyond the door and courtyard. Knowing one's limits brings no blame.

lines.textEn: Nine in the second place: Not going out of the gate and the courtyard brings misfortune.
lines.interpretationZh: 不出门庭，错失时机，过度节制反而凶险。
lines.interpretationEn: Not going beyond the gate brings misfortune. Excessive restraint at the wrong time.

lines.textZh: 六三：不节若，则嗟若，无咎。
lines.textEn: Six in the third place: He who knows no limitation will have cause to lament. No blame.
lines.interpretationZh: 不知节制就会有悲叹，但能自省则无咎。
lines.interpretationEn: Without limitation comes lamentation. But self-awareness removes blame.

lines.textEn: Six in the fourth place: Contented limitation. Success.
lines.interpretationZh: 安然接受节制，自然而然地守度，亨通。
lines.interpretationEn: Contented acceptance of limitation. Natural restraint brings success.

lines.textEn: Nine in the fifth place: Sweet limitation brings good fortune. Going brings esteem.
lines.interpretationZh: 甘心节制，吉利；前往行事会受到尊崇。
lines.interpretationEn: Sweet limitation brings good fortune. Taking action earns esteem.

lines.textEn: Six at the top: Galling limitation. Perseverance brings misfortune. Remorse disappears.
lines.interpretationZh: 苦涩的节制，坚持下去则凶，但悔恨终会消失。
lines.interpretationEn: Bitter limitation. Persisting brings misfortune, yet remorse eventually disappears.
